sections.heading: What is Password Hashing & Storage?
sections.body: bcrypt, argon2, salting, and why you never store plain passwords. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Password Hashing & Storage is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Password Hashing & Storage is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Password Hashing & Storage every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Password Hashing & Storage implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Password Hashing & Storage is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Password Hashing & Storage is a core concept in security. bcrypt, argon2, salting, and why you never store plain passwords. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
